detaileddescription.para: This structure describes a piece of interaction with the user
Describe all interface-specific data of the interface thread

memberdef.definition: void(* intf_thread_t::pf_show_dialog) (struct intf_thread_t *, int, int, intf_dialog_args_t *)
memberdef.name: pf_show_dialog

briefdescription.para: value coming from core for dialogue
time (in sec) until shown progress is finished

detaileddescription.para:
Retrieves the current input thread from the playlist.
The returned object must be released with vlc_object_release().
